categories.label: Scientific / reportable tracks
categories.description: Intentional scientific reruns or reportable output builders.

categories.label: Sensitivity / appendix tracks
categories.description: Supporting branches and backward-compatible aliases that are informative but not the main reportable path.

categories.label: Read-only packaging / help utilities
categories.description: Safe utilities that summarize or audit the current repo state without rerunning expensive science.

categories.label: Legacy prototype tracks
categories.description: Backward-compatible prototype workflows preserved for debugging and regression.

entries.label: Mindoro validation core + support bundle
entries.description: Prep, official Phase 1/2, the March 13 -> March 14 B1 Phase 3B primary public-validation row, the March 6 B2 legacy honesty row, broader public support, and the support-only Mindoro Phase 4 layer.
entries.notes: Use only when an intentional rerun of the main Mindoro spill-case validation chain is desired. The separate phase1_mindoro_focus_pre_spill_2016_2023 Mindoro-specific provenance lane stays outside this entry.

steps.description: Prep inputs, scoring grid, and shoreline artifacts
Official deterministic control and 50-member ensemble forecast
Extended-horizon guardrail inventory and NOAA source ingestion for the promoted B1 row
Mindoro support-only Phase 4 oil-type fate and shoreline-impact workflow

entries.label: Mindoro Phase 3B primary public validation
entries.description: Promoted March 13 -> March 14 NOAA public-validation row with explicit shared-imagery caveat while preserving the frozen March 3 -> March 6 case definition and March 6 legacy outputs.
entries.notes: Canonical B1 builder. This does not delete or relabel the March 6 B2 legacy honesty row, and the same-case PyGNOME comparator lane stays separate and comparator-only.

steps.description: Extended-horizon guardrail inventory and NOAA source ingestion

entries.label: Phase 1 regional reference rerun
entries.description: Dedicated 2016-2022 historical/regional drifter rerun preserved as the broader regional reference/governance lane; it stages the strict drogued-only non-overlapping 72 h registry and a regional candidate baseline artifact.
entries.notes: Scientific rerun only. This broader regional lane is preserved for reference/governance context and does not overwrite config/phase1_baseline_selection.yaml, does not auto-run phase1_audit or phase5_sync, and fails hard by default if a forcing-provider outage removes part of the official recipe family.

steps.description: Full 2016-2022 historical/regional Phase 1 production rerun with candidate-baseline staging only

entries.label: Mindoro support Phase 4 only
entries.description: Rebuild only the Mindoro support-only Phase 4 oil-type and shoreline interpretation layer.
entries.notes: Does not overwrite stored Mindoro or DWH Phase 3 validation outputs and does not change the main Mindoro validation claim.

steps.description: Mindoro support-only Phase 4 oil-type fate and shoreline-impact workflow

entries.label: DWH Phase 3C reportable bundle
entries.description: External-case setup, readiness-gated scientific forcing selection, deterministic transfer validation, ensemble comparison, and comparator-only PyGNOME work on the DWH truth masks.
entries.notes: Separate external transfer-validation story only. Mindoro remains the main Philippine thesis case; DWH observed masks remain truth; PyGNOME remains comparator-only; current frozen stack is HYCOM GOFS 3.1 + ERA5 + CMEMS wave/Stokes; forcing-readiness stays strict by default unless FORCING_OUTAGE_POLICY=continue_degraded is set explicitly.

steps.description: Readiness-gated scientific forcing check and stack freeze
Deterministic external transfer validation against observed DWH truth masks
Deterministic-vs-ensemble comparison against observed DWH truth masks
Comparator-only PyGNOME comparison against observed DWH truth masks

entries.label: Mindoro appendix / sensitivity bundle
entries.description: Public appendix, extended public scoring, March 23 stress test, retention, initialization, source-history, comparator, threshold, and recipe sensitivity branches.
entries.notes: These tracks are informative and reportable as support material, but the promoted B1 row now has its own scientific launcher entry. Forcing-only outages may skip the affected support branch with explicit degraded-mode honesty fields.

steps.description: March 23 extended public branch stress test
Rebuild/reuse the promoted March 13 -> March 14 B1 source bundle for downstream support tracks

entries.label: Mindoro-focused Phase 1 provenance rerun
entries.description: Separate 2016-2023 pre-spill Mindoro-focused drifter rerun that finalizes the Mindoro-specific recipe-provenance story for B1 using the February-April seasonal ranking subset.
entries.notes: Mindoro-specific provenance lane only. This does not rewrite the stored March 13 -> March 14 B1 raw-generation history, does not modify legacy 2016 prototype outputs, and currently evaluates the outage-constrained ERA5-backed family while archived NOAA/NCEI GFS access remains unavailable.

steps.description: Focused pre-spill 2016-2023 Mindoro Phase 1 provenance rerun

entries.label: Experimental Mindoro March 13-14 Phase 1 focus trial
entries.description: Separate archive-labeled March 13 -> March 14 replay using the staged Mindoro-focused Phase 1 provenance candidate baseline, with a direct comparison report against the stored canonical B1 row.
entries.notes: Archive-labeled comparison trial only. Runs only the OpenDrift March 13 -> March 14 lane in a separate directory; does not rerun PyGNOME or overwrite canonical B1 outputs.

steps.description: Ensure the stored extended public-observation registry and processed NOAA artifacts are available
Archive-labeled March 13 -> March 14 replay using the staged Mindoro-focused Phase 1 provenance candidate baseline

entries.label: Mindoro March 6 recovery sensitivity
entries.description: Appendix-only March 6 threshold, observation-support, and branch recovery matrix over R1 and selected A2 candidates.
entries.notes: Appendix-only. This does not replace or relabel the frozen strict March 6 official result.

entries.label: Mindoro March 23 extended public stress test
entries.description: Appendix-only exact-date March 23 NOAA/MSI public polygon stress test comparing the R0 and R1_previous branches.
entries.notes: Appendix-only. This does not replace the frozen strict March 6 official result or the final validation package.

steps.description: Extended-horizon guardrail inventory and March 23 source ingestion

entries.label: Legacy alias: Mindoro March 13-14 primary validation bundle
entries.description: Backward-compatible alias for the promoted March 13 -> March 14 B1 public-validation row plus the comparator-only March 14 cross-model lane.
entries.notes: Compatibility alias retained for older scripts. B1 is primary, B2 is legacy honesty-only, PyGNOME remains comparator-only, and the support-side B1 rebuild uses degraded forcing continuation if a temporary provider outage blocks only forcing acquisition.

steps.description: Extended-horizon guardrail inventory and NOAA source ingestion

entries.label: Phase 1 finalization audit
entries.description: Read-only architectural audit of Phase 1 against the stable Chapter 3 requirements.
entries.notes: Does not rerun the expensive 2016-2022 production study.

entries.label: Phase 2 finalization audit
entries.description: Read-only semantics/manifests audit of the current official Mindoro forecast outputs.
entries.notes: Does not rerun the expensive official forecast path by default.

entries.label: Final validation package refresh
entries.description: Read-only rebuild of the frozen thesis validation package from existing Mindoro and DWH outputs.
entries.notes: Reuses existing scientific outputs without recomputing scores.

entries.label: Phase 5 launcher/docs/package sync
entries.description: Read-only reproducibility, launcher, documentation, and package synchronization layer.
entries.notes: Builds final_reproducibility_package without overwriting scientific outputs.

entries.description: Read-only static gallery of trajectories, overlays, comparison maps, and Mindoro Phase 4 shoreline/oil-type figures.
entries.notes: Builds output/trajectory_gallery from existing outputs only and does not rerun expensive scientific branches.

entries.label: Trajectory gallery panel polish
entries.description: Read-only polished panel-ready figure pack with captions, locator insets, and comparison boards built from existing outputs only.
entries.notes: Builds output/trajectory_gallery_panel without rerunning expensive scientific branches.

steps.description: Read-only polished trajectory gallery board build

entries.label: Publication-grade figure package
entries.description: Read-only canonical presentation package with publication-grade single figures, comparison boards, captions, and talking points built from existing outputs only.
entries.notes: Builds output/figure_package_publication without rerunning expensive scientific branches.

entries.label: Prototype 2016 final paper figures
entries.description: Read-only curated legacy-2016 final paper-figure export built from existing Phase 2, benchmark, and prototype similarity outputs only.
entries.notes: Builds output/2016 Legacy Runs FINAL Figures without rerunning the scientific workflow. This is a legacy-support paper set only; output/figure_package_publication remains the canonical generic publication package.

steps.description: Read-only curated legacy-2016 final paper-figure export

entries.label: Prototype 2021 preferred debug bundle
entries.description: Preferred accepted-segment debug/demo path: prep, Phase 1/2, deterministic PyGNOME benchmark, and support-only similarity package.
entries.notes: Preferred debug/demo lane only. Built from the two accepted 2021 strict-gate drifter segments, uses the official four-recipe Phase 1 family, and stops at the transport-core bundle. Phase 3B and Phase 4 are separate and are not part of this proof path.

steps.description: Prototype 2021 cross-case PyGNOME similarity summary and forecast figure package

entries.label: Prototype 2016 legacy bundle
entries.description: Historical legacy-only prep, Phase 1/2, Phase 3A PyGNOME comparator package, legacy Phase 4 weathering/fate analysis, and the curated final paper-figure export.
entries.notes: Backward-compatible legacy debug/regression path only. Not the preferred debug lane and not the final Chapter 3 Phase 1 study. Prototype prep now attempts GFS too, but missing GFS remains best-effort and does not collapse the legacy bundle. The visible thesis-facing legacy flow is Phase 1 -> Phase 2 -> Phase 3A -> Phase 4, with Phase 5 available separately through phase5_sync. The PyGNOME similarity step is transport-only, comparator-only, and now surfaces deterministic plus p50/p90 legacy support tracks. There is no thesis-facing prototype_2016 Phase 3B or Phase 3C.

steps.description: Prototype legacy Phase 3A cross-case PyGNOME similarity summary and forecast figure package
Prototype legacy Phase 4 oil weathering and fate analysis
Curated final paper-figure export for the legacy 2016 support cases
